project_description.value: Fox and Finch Apartments — 525 Boren Midrise Apartment / Mixed Use, 525 Boren Avenue North, Seattle WA 98109

customer_code_sage.source: 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages)

general_contractor.value: Synergy Construction, Inc. (14040 NE 181st St, Woodinville WA 98072)

contract_type.value: Lump Sum subcontract per AGC Washington 2006 GC template

contract_document.value: Subcontract #007 — Lump Sum $825,370.00 (AGC of Washington 2006 Ed.) + 8% retainage clause

jobsite_location.value: 525 Boren Ave N, Seattle, WA 98109 · Parcel 1983200345

unit_count.value: 60 residential units (inferred from 60 TOTO C744E bowls + 60 ST743E tanks)

Building Profile.value: 7-story midrise apartment (L1-L7 + rooftop mech room + basement) per SOV — mixed-use with L1 retail + dog wash + leasing office
Building Profile.source: Billing/525 Boren SOV template with contract value.xlsx

work_period.source: 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages)

Fixture Inventory.value: 669 fixture-line units across 20 SKUs — 60 toilets (56 TOTO C744E + 4 C744EL ADA) · 60 china lavs (TOTO LT231) · 60 Grohe lav faucets · 51 kitchen faucets · 59 shower valve trims · 17 tub spouts · 59 Aquatic tub/shower units (32×1483EN + 17×2603SMTE + 10×1423C) · 3 Moen ADA hand-shower kits · 1 Mustee dog wash + 1 Kohler grid drain. Submittals on file: 12 fixture PDFs + 8 tub/shower PDFs.
Fixture Inventory.source: Vendor Quotes/BOREN - Vender Quote Spreadsheet.xlsx · Submittals/FIXTURE SUBMITTALS/ · Submittals/TUB & SHOWER SUBMITTALS/

Plans / Specifications.value: Full plumbing construction set (525-Plumbing Construction Set PR.pdf) + 11 MEP DWGs (basement, L1-L7, Roof) in Brett 525 Boren/; MEP Superplots 2016-02/02/03

Submittals.value: 44 submittals across 7 categories (Equipment-7, Fixtures-12, Material-5, Responses-1, Sleeving Plans-1, Tub/Shower-8, Underground/Garage-10)

Permits.value: 5 permits (Plumbing, Gas, Gas Temp Heat, Backflow, Renewed Plumbing+Gas+Backflow). Gas permit SR1397520 to 525 Boren LLC.

Change Orders (on file).value: 2 CORs (COR#01 Temp Gas $357 executed as CO, COR#02 Unclog Toilet $293 warranty-era); 1 Budget Transfer (CO#02); SOV shows +$4,940 adjustment between draws #1-#2

ASI / RFI.value: 2 change-events: ASI-12 MEP Peer Review Response + PR-02 Media Room Redesign

Warranty Incident.value: Retail Sewer Problem — 30 photos+videos dated 12/06/2018 (~17 months post-closeout). COR#02 Unclog Toilet $293 issued 10/27/2017.

Billing.value: 15 pay applications (App #1 2016-03-20 → App #15 2017-07-20), Contract Total $830,667.00 @ App #15. 16.5-mo billing window.

Invoices (subfolder).value: 36 AP invoice PDFs filed by cost code (212-Canout:5, 230-Trim:9, 241-Water Main:13, 243-Cond-Drain:2, 601-Eng:3, 607-Other:4)

Vendor Quotes (bid file).value: Bidding spreadsheet w/ 5 suppliers (CONS/KELLER/FEI/ROSEN + alternate); 7 quote docs on file

Insurance / Closeout.value: Certificate of Insurance 2016-17 on file; O&M manual + Warranty package; 5 vendor lien waivers (Consolidated/Ferguson/Keller/Rosen + template); Full & Final Lien Claim Waiver
Insurance / Closeout.source: Insurance/ · O&M_s/ · Vendor Lien Waivers/ · Billing/

Total Unique Documents Reviewed.source: Full folder scan of owp-2026/2026-Synergy, 525 Boren -Fox and Finch Apts 4/ including Contract, COs/CORs, Billing, Submittals, Invoices, Permits, ASI-RFI, Plans, Vendor Lien Waivers, Vendor Quotes

po_commitments.description: Fox and Finch Apts plumbing (underground, rough-in, finish, gas, water main, mech room)
po_commitments.source: 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages) (cost-code budget + AR invoices). No PO document in folder.

po_commitments.po_number: NOTE: Contract $825,370.00 (code 999 Org) + $4,940 SOV adj (App#1→#2) + $357 CO#1 Temp Gas (App#15) = $830,667.00 final. Ties exactly to JDR revenue and to SOV draw #15 Contract Total.

billing_sov.pay_app_number: PAY APPS RECONCILIATION: Sum of 'This Period' = $830,667 (ties exactly to Contract Total @ App#15 and JDR revenue). Billing cadence 16.5 mo: slow start Mar-May 2016 (~$100K/2 mo underground+design) → roughin ramp Aug-Nov 2016 (52% of value in 4 months) → trim/punchlist Dec 2016-Jun 2017.

NOTE: JDR AR includes reversal+reissue pairs (Sage practice). Net cumulative billed = $830,667.00 revenue + $41,533.35 retainage, matches Pay App #15 Contract Total. Retainage NOT released as of JDR 04/03/2026. Full & Final Lien Claim Waiver on file (Billing folder).

location.value: 525 Boren Ave N, Seattle, WA 98109 · Parcel 1983200345

direct_cost.source: Σ labor + material + OH + burden + tax

change_log.subject: Original prime subcontract #007 for Fox and Finch plumbing — $825,370.00 Lump Sum (AGC of Washington 2006 Ed., Synergy proj #750)
Contract total rolled from $825,370.00 → $830,310.00 (+$4,940.00) — no formal CO doc in folder, surfaces first in Billing draw #2 SOV
ASI-12 MEP Peer Review Response — design-reviewer response to MEP drawings
PR-02 Media Room Redesign — designer-issued proposal request (no CO resulted; absorbed into base)

COR #01 Temp Gas Permit — total $357 to pull temp gas permit + inspection (1 permit $140 + 2 hrs labor $170 + tax). Executed as CO#2 Temporary Gas Meter (signed). Tied to Budget Transfer CO #02 XLSX ($357 sale price at code 603 Permits).
change_log.source_document: Change Orders/COR_s/525 Boren - COR #01 Temp Gas Permit.pdf · Change Orders/COR_s/Temp Gas Permit.xlsx · Change Orders/BUDGET TRANSFERS/525 Boren - Budget Transfer - CO #02.xlsx

change_log.subject: CO#2 Temporary Gas Meter — $357 signed PDF + scanned copy on file. Appears in Billing draw #15 SOV as +$357 to contract total = $830,667.
change_log.source_document: Change Orders/CO_s/CO 2 Temporary Gas Meter Signed.pdf · Billing/525 Boren SOV draw #15  7-20-17.xlsx

change_log.subject: COR #02 Unclog Construction Debris from Toilet — $293 to unclog 2x2 wood debris lodged in toilet. Post-closeout / warranty-era; no corresponding CO signed (likely absorbed as backcharge or OH).
change_log.source_document: Change Orders/COR_s/525 Boren - COR #02 Unclog Construction Debris from Toilet.pdf

change_log.subject: Shower option pricing — 32 tub swap (1483EN → 1363BFSD w/ removable threshold). Priced $1,936 labor + $5,666 material. No CO issued; absorbed or cancelled.

Sewer Problem pricing — PM + Foreman + Apprentice + camera equipment to investigate sewer blockage. Likely related to 2018-12-06 Retail Sewer Problem warranty incident (30 photos/videos). No CO resulted (likely backcharge-offset / warranty absorb).
Finish Material (code 230) revised $78,595 → $82,765 (+$4,170)
change_log.source_document: 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages)

change_log.subject: Permits & Licenses (code 603) revised $5,420 → $5,560 (+$140) — includes Temp Gas CO#1 $140
change_log.source_document: 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages) + Budget Transfer CO#02 XLSX

change_log.subject: Payroll Burden (code 995) revised $83,136.63 → $83,200.08

change_log.source_document: Billing/525 Boren SOV draw #15  7-20-17.xlsx + 2026 Job Detail Report.pdf (Sage Timberline export, printed 04/03/2026 1:51PM, 106 pages)

root_cause_analysis.observation: COR #02 Unclog Construction Debris from Toilet — $293 to unclog 2x2 wood debris lodged in toilet. Post-closeout / warranty-era; no correspon

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Above-target performance — analyze drivers (crew, scope, GC) for repeatability
